    "print(\"dataset for current job:\", DATA_PATH)"

   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "## Register Datasets"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "### prepare and register dataset"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 3,
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "def get_dataset_function(image_root, sem_seg_root, label=\"train\", split=DATA_SPLIT_N, fold=DATA_SPLIT_FOLD, seed=DATA_SPLIT_SEED):\n",
    "    \n",
    "    assert 0 < fold <= split\n",
    "    \n",
    "    dataset = load_sem_seg(sem_seg_root, image_root)\n",
    "    \n",
    "    np.random.seed(seed)\n",
    "    ix = np.array(range(len(dataset)))\n",
    "    np.random.shuffle(ix)\n",
    "    ps = np.linspace(0, len(dataset), split+1, dtype=int)\n",
    "    \n",
    "    val_ix = ix[ps[fold-1]: ps[fold]]\n",
    "    \n",
    "    if label == 'train':\n",
    "        return lambda : [data for index, data in enumerate(dataset) if index not in val_ix]\n",
    "    elif label == 'val':\n",
    "        return lambda : [data for index, data in enumerate(dataset) if index in val_ix]"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 4,
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "dataset = []\n",
    "for data_path in DATA_PATHS:\n",
    "    name = data_path.split(\"-\")[-1]\n",
    "    image_root = os.path.join(data_path, \"imgs\")\n",
    "    sem_seg_root = os.path.join(data_path, \"masks\")\n",
    "    \n",
    "    for label in ['train', 'val']:\n",
    "        metadata = Metadata(\n",
    "            name=f'{name}_{label}',\n",
    "            stuff_classes=['background', 'damage'],\n",
    "            stuff_colors=[(0, 0, 0), (255, 255, 255)],\n",
    "            image_root=image_root,\n",
    "            sem_seg_root=sem_seg_root,\n",
    "            evaluator_type='sem_seg',\n",
    "            ignore_label=255,\n",
    "        )\n",
    "        \n",
    "        if f\"{name}_{label}\" in DatasetCatalog:\n",
    "            DatasetCatalog.remove(f\"{name}_{label}\")\n",
    "        DatasetCatalog.register(f\"{name}_{label}\", get_dataset_function(image_root, sem_seg_root, label))\n",
    "        \n",
    "        if f\"{name}_{label}\" in MetadataCatalog:\n",
    "            MetadataCatalog.remove(f\"{name}_{label}\")\n",
    "        MetadataCatalog[f\"{name}_{label}\"] = metadata"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "### prepare and register adhension keypoints dataset"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 5,
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "def get_adhension_dataset_function(json_file, img_dir, sem_dir, label=\"train\", split=DATA_SPLIT_N, fold=DATA_SPLIT_FOLD, seed=DATA_SPLIT_SEED):\n",
    "            \n",
    "    assert 0 < fold <= split\n",
    "    \n",
    "    with open(json_file) as f:\n",
    "        imgs_anns = json.load(f)\n",
    "    \n",
    "    items = imgs_anns.values()\n",
    "    \n",
    "    np.random.seed(seed)\n",
    "    ix = np.array(range(len(items)))\n",
    "    np.random.shuffle(ix)\n",
    "    ps = np.linspace(0, len(items), split+1, dtype=int)\n",
    "    \n",
    "    val_ix = ix[ps[fold-1]: ps[fold]]\n",
    "\n",
    "    dataset_dicts = []\n",
    "    for idx, v in enumerate(items):\n",
    "        \n",
    "        if label == \"train\" and idx in val_ix:\n",
    "            continue\n",
    "        if label == \"val\" and idx not in val_ix:\n",
    "            continue\n",
    "        \n",
    "        record = {}\n",
    "        \n",
    "        filename = os.path.join(img_dir, v[\"filename\"][:-3] + \"jpg\")\n",
    "        segmfile = os.path.join(sem_dir, v[\"filename\"][:-3] + \"png\")\n",
    "        height, width = imread(filename).shape[:2]\n",
    "        \n",
    "        record[\"file_name\"] = filename\n",
    "        record[\"image_id\"] = idx\n",
    "        record[\"height\"] = height\n",
    "        record[\"width\"] = width\n",
    "      \n",
    "        annos = v[\"regions\"]\n",
    "        objs = []\n",
    "        for anno in annos:\n",
    "            # assert not anno[\"region_attributes\"]\n",
    "            anno = anno[\"shape_attributes\"]\n",
    "            px = anno[\"all_points_x\"]\n",
    "            py = anno[\"all_points_y\"]\n",
    "            poly = [(x + 0.5, y + 0.5) for x, y in zip(px, py)] \\\n",
    "                 + [(x - 0.5, y - 0.5) for x, y in zip(px[::-1], py[::-1])]\n",
    "            poly = [p for x in poly for p in x]\n",
    "\n",
    "            obj = {\n",
    "                \"bbox\": [np.min(px), np.min(py), np.max(px), np.max(py)],\n",
    "                \"bbox_mode\": BoxMode.XYXY_ABS,\n",
    "                \"segmentation\": [poly + poly[:2]],\n",
    "                \"category_id\": 0,\n",
    "                \"iscrowd\": 0,\n",
    "            }\n",
    "            objs.append(obj)\n",
    "        record[\"annotations\"] = objs\n",
    "        record[\"sem_seg_file_name\"] = segmfile\n",
    "        dataset_dicts.append(record)\n",
    "    return lambda: dataset_dicts"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 6,
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "image_root = os.path.join(ADHENSION_DATA_PATH, \"imgs\")\n",
    "sem_seg_root = os.path.join(ADHENSION_DATA_PATH, \"masks\")\n",
    "json_file = os.path.join(ADHENSION_DATA_PATH, \"via_export_json.json\")\n",
    "name = f\"gridline\"\n",
    "\n",
    "for label in [\"train\", \"val\"]:\n",
    "\n",
    "    metadata = Metadata(\n",
    "        name=f'{name}_{label}',\n",
    "        thing_classes=['line'],\n",
    "        thing_colors=[(255, 0, 0)],\n",
    "        stuff_classes=['background', 'damage'],\n",
    "        stuff_colors=[(0, 0, 0), (255, 255, 255)],\n",
    "        keypoint_names=[\"p1\", \"p2\"],\n",
    "        keypoint_connection_rules=[(\"p1\", \"p2\", (255, 0, 0))],\n",
    "        image_root=image_root,\n",
    "        sem_seg_root=sem_seg_root,\n",
    "        evaluator_type='sem_seg',\n",
    "        keypoint_flip_map=[],\n",
    "        ignore_label=255,\n",
    "    )\n",
    "    if f'{name}_{label}' in DatasetCatalog:\n",
    "            DatasetCatalog.remove(f'{name}_{label}')\n",
    "    DatasetCatalog.register(f'{name}_{label}', get_adhension_dataset_function(\n",
    "        json_file, image_root, sem_seg_root, label=label))\n",
    "\n",
    "    if f'{name}_{label}' in MetadataCatalog:\n",
    "            MetadataCatalog.remove(f\"{name}_{label}\")\n",
    "    MetadataCatalog[f\"{name}_{label}\"] = metadata"
   ]
  },

  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "## Model Training"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "### build dataset-mapper"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 9,
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "from detectron2.data import DatasetMapper\n",
    "import copy, torch, json\n",
    "from detectron2.data import transforms as T\n",
    "from detectron2.data import detection_utils as utils\n",
    "\n",
    "class MyDatasetMapper(DatasetMapper):\n",
    "    \n",
    "    def __call__(self, dataset_dict):\n",
    "        \n",
    "        \"\"\"\n",
    "        Args:\n",
    "            dataset_dict (dict): Metadata of one image, in Detectron2 Dataset format.\n",
    "        Returns:\n",
    "            dict: a format that builtin models in detectron2 accept\n",
    "        \"\"\"\n",
    "        \n",
    "        dataset_dict = copy.deepcopy(dataset_dict)\n",
    "\n",
    "        image = utils.read_image(dataset_dict[\"file_name\"], format=self.image_format)\n",
    "        utils.check_image_size(dataset_dict, image)\n",
    "        sem_seg_gt = utils.read_image(dataset_dict.pop(\"sem_seg_file_name\"), \"L\").squeeze(2)\n",
    "\n",
    "        aug_input = T.AugInput(image, sem_seg=sem_seg_gt)\n",
    "        transforms = self.augmentations(aug_input)\n",
    "        image_transformed, sem_seg_gt_transformed = aug_input.image, aug_input.sem_seg\n",
    "\n",
    "        image_shape = image_transformed.shape[:2]\n",
    "\n",
    "        dataset_dict[\"image\"] = torch.as_tensor(np.ascontiguousarray(image_transformed.transpose(2, 0, 1)))\n",
    "        \n",
    "        if sem_seg_gt is not None:\n",
    "            dataset_dict[\"sem_seg\"] = torch.as_tensor(sem_seg_gt_transformed.astype(\"long\"))\n",
    "\n",
    "        annos = [\n",
    "            utils.transform_instance_annotations(obj, transforms, image_shape)\n",
    "            for obj in dataset_dict[\"annotations\"]\n",
    "            if obj.get(\"iscrowd\", 0) == 0\n",
    "        ]\n",
    "\n",
    "        annos = [anno for anno in annos if len(anno['segmentation']) > 0]\n",
    "\n",
    "        for anno in annos:\n",
    "            \n",
    "            poly = anno['segmentation'][0]\n",
    "            x1, y1 = x2, y2 = poly[:2]\n",
    "            d0 = 0\n",
    "            for x, y in zip(poly[2::2], poly[3::2]):\n",
    "                d = (x-x1)**2 + (y-y1)**2\n",
    "                if d > d0:\n",
    "                    x2, y2, d0 = x, y, d\n",
    "\n",
    "            if (x1-x2)**2 > (y1-y2)**2:\n",
    "                if x1 < x2:\n",
    "                    anno['keypoints'] = [(x1, y1, 2), (x2, y2, 2)]\n",
    "                else:\n",
    "                    anno['keypoints'] = [(x2, y2, 2), (x1, y1, 2)]\n",
    "            else:\n",
    "                if y1 < y2:\n",
    "                    anno['keypoints'] = [(x1, y1, 2), (x2, y2, 2)]\n",
    "                else:\n",
    "                    anno['keypoints'] = [(x2, y2, 2), (x1, y1, 2)]\n",
    "\n",
    "            anno['bbox'] = np.array([min(x1, x2), min(y1, y2), max(x1, x2)+1, max(y1, y2)+1]).astype(int)\n",
    "            # anno.pop('segmentation')\n",
    "\n",
    "        dataset_dict[\"annotations\"] = annos\n",
    "\n",
    "        instances = utils.annotations_to_instances(\n",
    "            annos, image_shape, mask_format='polygon'\n",
    "        )\n",
    "\n",
    "        instances.gt_boxes = instances.gt_masks.get_bounding_boxes()\n",
    "        dataset_dict[\"instances\"] = instances = utils.filter_empty_instances(instances)\n",
    "        \n",
    "        if self.proposal_topk is not None:\n",
    "            utils.transform_proposals(\n",
    "                dataset_dict, image_shape, transforms, proposal_topk=self.proposal_topk\n",
    "            )\n",
    "\n",
    "        if not self.is_train:\n",
    "            dataset_dict.pop(\"annotations\", None)\n",
    "            dataset_dict.pop(\"sem_seg_file_name\", None)\n",
    "            return dataset_dict\n",
    "\n",
    "        return dataset_dict"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "### setup configuration"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 10,
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "cfg = get_cfg()\n",
    "cfg.merge_from_file(CONFIG_PATH)\n",
    "\n",
    "\n",
    "cfg.DATASETS.TRAIN = (\"gridline_train\",)\n",
    "cfg.DATASETS.TEST = (\"gridline_val\",)\n",
    "\n",
    "cfg.MODEL.WEIGHTS = WEIGHT_PATH\n",
    "cfg.OUTPUT_DIR = LOG_PATH\n",
    "\n",
    "cfg.DATALOADER.NUM_WORKERS = 8\n",
    "\n",
    "cfg.INPUT.CROP.ENABLED = True\n",
    "cfg.INPUT.CROP.SIZE = (384, 512)\n",
    "cfg.INPUT.CROP.TYPE = 'absolute_range'\n",
    "cfg.INPUT.MIN_SIZE_TRAIN = (512, 768)\n",
    "cfg.INPUT.MIN_SIZE_TRAIN_SAMPLING = 'range'\n",
    "cfg.INPUT.MAX_SIZE_TRAIN = 768\n",
    "cfg.INPUT.MIN_SIZE_TEST = 512\n",
    "cfg.INPUT.MAX_SIZE_TEST = 512\n",
    "\n",
    "cfg.SOLVER.IMS_PER_BATCH = 2\n",
    "cfg.SOLVER.BASE_LR = 0.001\n",
    "cfg.SOLVER.WARMUP_ITERS = 1000\n",
    "cfg.SOLVER.MAX_ITER = 200000\n",
    "cfg.SOLVER.STEPS = (150000, 180000)\n",
    "cfg.SOLVER.CHECKPOINT_PERIOD = 5000\n",
    "\n",
    "cfg.TEST.EVAL_PERIOD = 5000\n",
    "\n",
    "cfg.MODEL.META_ARCHITECTURE = \"SemSegInstanceFPN\"\n",
    "cfg.MODEL.MASK_ON = False\n",
    "cfg.MODEL.KEYPOINT_ON = True\n",
    "cfg.MODEL.ROI_KEYPOINT_HEAD.MIN_KEYPOINTS_PER_IMAGE = 0\n",
    "cfg.MODEL.ROI_KEYPOINT_HEAD.NUM_KEYPOINTS = 2\n",
    "cfg.MODEL.SEM_SEG_HEAD.NUM_CLASSES = 1+1\n",
    "cfg.MODEL.ROI_HEADS.SCORE_THRESH_TEST = 0.2\n",
    "cfg.MODEL.ROI_KEYPOINT_HEAD.CONV_DIMS = (256, 256, 256, 256, 256, 256, 256, 256)\n",
    "cfg.MODEL.ROI_KEYPOINT_HEAD.POOLER_RESOLUTION = 7\n",
    "\n",
    "os.makedirs(cfg.OUTPUT_DIR, exist_ok=True)"
   ]
  },

   "execution_count": 12,
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "metadata = MetadataCatalog.get(f\"gridline_train\")\n",

    "    json.dump(metadata.as_dict(), file)"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "### train!"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 1,
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "from detectron2.evaluation import SemSegEvaluator, COCOEvaluator\n",
    "import detectron2.data.transforms as T\n",
    "from detectron2.data import DatasetMapper, build_detection_train_loader"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 13,
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "class Trainer(DefaultTrainer):\n",
    "    \n",
    "    @classmethod\n",
    "    def build_evaluator(cls, cfg, dataset_name, output_folder=None):\n",
    "        return SemSegEvaluator(dataset_name, distributed=True)\n",
    "    \n",
    "    @classmethod\n",
    "    def build_train_loader(cls, cfg):\n",
    "        \n",
    "        dataloader = build_detection_train_loader(cfg,\n",
    "           mapper=MyDatasetMapper(cfg, is_train=True, augmentations=[\n",
    "            T.RandomFlip(horizontal=True, vertical=False),\n",
    "            T.RandomFlip(horizontal=False, vertical=True),\n",
    "            T.RandomBrightness(0.6, 2.0),\n",
    "            T.RandomContrast(0.3, 3),\n",
    "            T.RandomRotation([0, 90, 180, 270], expand=True, sample_style=\"choice\"),\n",
    "            T.RandomRotation((-10, 10), expand=True, sample_style=\"range\"),\n",
    "            T.ResizeShortestEdge(cfg.INPUT.MIN_SIZE_TRAIN, cfg.INPUT.MAX_SIZE_TRAIN, cfg.INPUT.MIN_SIZE_TRAIN_SAMPLING),\n",
    "            T.RandomCrop(cfg.INPUT.CROP.TYPE, cfg.INPUT.CROP.SIZE,),\n",
    "           ]))\n",
    "        \n",
    "        return dataloader"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 14,
   "metadata": {
    "scrolled": true
   },
   "outputs": [
    {
     "name": "stdout",
     "output_type": "stream",
     "text": [

      "\u001b[0;32m~/anaconda3/envs/flask/lib/python3.7/selectors.py\u001b[0m in \u001b[0;36mselect\u001b[0;34m(self, timeout)\u001b[0m\n\u001b[1;32m    413\u001b[0m         \u001b[0mready\u001b[0m \u001b[0;34m=\u001b[0m \u001b[0;34m[\u001b[0m\u001b[0;34m]\u001b[0m\u001b[0;34m\u001b[0m\u001b[0;34m\u001b[0m\u001b[0m\n\u001b[1;32m    414\u001b[0m         \u001b[0;32mtry\u001b[0m\u001b[0;34m:\u001b[0m\u001b[0;34m\u001b[0m\u001b[0;34m\u001b[0m\u001b[0m\n\u001b[0;32m--> 415\u001b[0;31m             \u001b[0mfd_event_list\u001b[0m \u001b[0;34m=\u001b[0m \u001b[0mself\u001b[0m\u001b[0;34m.\u001b[0m\u001b[0m_selector\u001b[0m\u001b[0;34m.\u001b[0m\u001b[0mpoll\u001b[0m\u001b[0;34m(\u001b[0m\u001b[0mtimeout\u001b[0m\u001b[0;34m)\u001b[0m\u001b[0;34m\u001b[0m\u001b[0;34m\u001b[0m\u001b[0m\n\u001b[0m\u001b[1;32m    416\u001b[0m         \u001b[0;32mexcept\u001b[0m \u001b[0mInterruptedError\u001b[0m\u001b[0;34m:\u001b[0m\u001b[0;34m\u001b[0m\u001b[0;34m\u001b[0m\u001b[0m\n\u001b[1;32m    417\u001b[0m             \u001b[0;32mreturn\u001b[0m \u001b[0mready\u001b[0m\u001b[0;34m\u001b[0m\u001b[0;34m\u001b[0m\u001b[0m\n",

    "with open(f\"{LOG_PATH}/metrics.json\", \"r\") as file:\n",
    "    metrics = pd.DataFrame([json.loads(item) for item in file.read().split(\"\\n\")[:-1]])\n",

    "metrics = metrics[['iteration', 'total_loss', 'loss_sem_seg', 'loss_keypoint', 'sem_seg/mIoU']].dropna()\n",

  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 15,
   "metadata": {},

     "name": "stdout",
     "output_type": "stream",
     "text": [
      "saved best model: model_0074999.pth\n"
     ]
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "best_model = int(metrics[metrics['iteration'] % 5000 == 4999].sort_values(f\"sem_seg/mIoU\", ascending=False).iloc[0]['iteration'])\n",
    "best_model = \"model_%07d.pth\" % best_model\n",
    "import shutil\n",
    "shutil.copy(os.path.join(LOG_PATH, best_model), os.path.join(LOG_PATH, \"model_best.pth\"))\n",
    "\n",
    "print(\"saved best model:\", best_model)"
   ]

  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "## Model Evaluation"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 16,
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "import torch\n",
    "import timeit\n",
    "from tqdm import tqdm\n",
    "from skimage.io import imsave\n",
    "\n",
    "import warnings\n",
    "warnings.filterwarnings('ignore', category=UserWarning)"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 46,
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "def load_model(model_path):\n",
    "    \n",
    "    cfg = get_cfg()\n",
    "    cfg.merge_from_file(os.path.join(model_path, \"model\", \"config.yaml\"))\n",
    "    cfg.MODEL.WEIGHTS = os.path.join(model_path, \"model\", \"model_best.pth\")\n",
    "    cfg.MODEL.DEVICE = DEVICE\n",
    "    predictor = DefaultPredictor(cfg)\n",
    "    \n",
    "    return predictor\n",
    "\n",
    "\n",
    "def load_data(data_path, split=DATA_SPLIT_N, fold=DATA_SPLIT_FOLD, seed=DATA_SPLIT_SEED):\n",
    "    image_root = os.path.join(data_path, \"imgs\")\n",
    "    sem_seg_root = os.path.join(data_path, \"masks\")\n",
    "    dataset = load_sem_seg(sem_seg_root, image_root)\n",
    "    \n",
    "    np.random.seed(seed)\n",
    "    ix = np.array(range(len(dataset)))\n",
    "    np.random.shuffle(ix)\n",
    "    ps = np.linspace(0, len(dataset), split+1, dtype=int)\n",
    "    val_ix = ix[ps[fold-1]: ps[fold]]\n",
    "    \n",
    "    dataset_train = [data for index, data in enumerate(dataset) if index not in val_ix]\n",
    "    dataset_val = [data for index, data in enumerate(dataset) if index in val_ix]\n",
    "    return dataset_train, dataset_val\n",
    "\n",
    "\n",
    "def process_dataset(predictor, dataset, saveto):\n",
    "    \n",
    "    results = []\n",
    "    for data in tqdm(dataset):\n",
    "        image = imread(data['file_name'])\n",
    "        if len(image.shape) == 2:\n",
    "            image = gray2rgb(image)\n",
    "        ID = os.path.split(data['file_name'])[1][:-4]\n",
    "        start = timeit.default_timer()\n",
    "        out = predictor(image)['sem_seg']\n",
    "        mask_pr = torch.max(out, 0)[1].cpu().numpy().astype(np.uint8)\n",
    "        stop = timeit.default_timer()\n",
    "        mask_gt = imread(data['sem_seg_file_name']).astype(np.uint8)\n",
    "        mask_pr_file_name = os.path.join(saveto, ID + \".png\")\n",
    "        imsave(mask_pr_file_name, mask_pr)\n",
    "        \n",
    "        result = {}\n",
    "        result['ID'] = ID\n",
    "        result['image'] = os.path.abspath(data['file_name'])\n",
    "        result['mask_pr'] = os.path.abspath(mask_pr_file_name)\n",
    "        result['mask_gt'] = os.path.abspath(data['sem_seg_file_name'])\n",
    "        result['area%_pr'] = mask_pr_area = mask_pr.sum() / len(mask_pr.reshape(-1)) * 100\n",
    "        result['area%_gt'] = mask_gt_area = mask_gt.sum() / len(mask_gt.reshape(-1)) * 100\n",
    "        result['absolute_area%-diff'] = np.abs(mask_pr_area - mask_gt_area)\n",
    "        result['pACC'] = pACC = np.sum(mask_pr == mask_gt) / len(mask_pr.reshape(-1))\n",
    "        result['time'] = stop - start\n",
    "        results.append(result)\n",
    "    \n",
    "    results = pd.DataFrame(results)\n",
    "    return results\n",
    "\n",
    "\n",
    "def benchmark_model(model_path, data_path, save_folder=\"result\"):\n",
    "    predictor = load_model(model_path)\n",
    "    dataset_train, dataset_val = load_data(data_path)\n",
    "    \n",
    "    saveto = os.path.join(model_path, save_folder)\n",
    "    os.makedirs(saveto, exist_ok=True)\n",
    "    result_train = process_dataset(predictor, dataset_train, saveto)\n",
    "    result_val = process_dataset(predictor, dataset_val, saveto)\n",
    "    result_train['label'], result_val['label'] = 'train', 'val'\n",
    "    result = pd.concat([result_train, result_val])\n",
    "    result.to_csv(os.path.join(saveto, \"meta.csv\"), index=False)\n",
    "    \n",
    "    data = {\n",
    "        \"MAE-area%-train\": float(result_train['absolute_area%-diff'].mean()),\n",
    "        \"MAE-area%-val\": float(result_val['absolute_area%-diff'].mean()),\n",
    "        \"RMSE-area%-train\": float((result_train['absolute_area%-diff']**2).mean()) ** 0.5,\n",
    "        \"RMSE-area%-val\": float((result_val['absolute_area%-diff']**2).mean()) ** 0.5,\n",
    "        \"time\": float(result['time'].mean())\n",
    "    }\n",
    "    \n",
    "    with open(os.path.join(saveto, \"evaluation_manual.json\"), \"w\") as fp:\n",
    "        json.dump(data, fp)\n",
    "    \n",
    "    print(\"manual evaluation:\")\n",
    "    print(data)\n",
    "    \n",
    "    return\n",
    "        \n",
    "\n",
    "def benchmark_models(model_paths, data_path, save_folder=\"result\"):\n",
    "    for index, model_path in enumerate(model_paths):\n",
    "        print(f\"Evaluating model ({index+1:02}/{len(model_paths):02}): {model_path}\")\n",
    "        benchmark_model(model_path, data_path, save_folder)\n",
    "        \n",
    "\n",
    "def plot_result():\n",
    "    name = os.path.split(os.path.abspath(\".\"))[-1]\n",
    "    meta = pd.read_csv(os.path.join(RESULT_PATH, \"meta.csv\"))\n",
    "    meta = meta.sort_values(\"area%_gt\", ascending=True).reset_index(drop=True)\n",
    "    meta_train = meta[meta['label'] == 'train']\n",
    "    meta_val = meta[meta['label'] == 'val']\n",
    "\n",
    "    plt.figure(figsize=(16, 10))\n",
    "    plt.scatter(meta_train.index, meta_train['area%_gt'], edgecolor=\"black\", facecolors='none', label='manual (training set)')\n",
    "    plt.scatter(meta_val.index, meta_val['area%_gt'], marker='s', edgecolor=\"black\", facecolors='black', label='manual (validation set)')\n",
    "    plt.scatter(meta.index, meta['area%_pr'], marker=\"o\", c=meta['absolute_area%-diff'], cmap='coolwarm', vmin=0, vmax=5, label='algorithm')\n",
    "    plt.ylabel(\"affected area percentage (%)\", fontsize=(18))\n",
    "    plt.xlabel(\"samples\", fontsize=(18))\n",
    "    plt.yticks(fontsize=(18))\n",
    "    plt.xticks(fontsize=(18))\n",
    "    plt.title(JOB + f\" ({name})\", fontsize=18)\n",
    "    plt.text(0, meta['area%_pr'].max() * 0.8, \"Mean Absolute Error (MAE) = %.2f%%\" % meta['absolute_area%-diff'].mean(), fontsize=18)\n",
    "    plt.legend(fontsize=18)\n",
    "    plt.savefig(os.path.join(f\"evaluation-{name}.jpg\"))\n",
    "    plt.show()"
   ]
  },
  {

    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "from skimage.color import gray2rgb\n",
    "import torch\n",
    "from torch.nn.functional import softmax\n",
    "\n",
    "dataset_dicts = DatasetCatalog.get(\"gridline_val\")\n",
    "metadata = MetadataCatalog.get(\"gridline_val\")\n",
    "\n",
    "test_mapper = MyDatasetMapper(cfg, is_train=False)\n",
    "\n",
    "for d in dataset_dicts:\n",
    "    \n",
    "    im = imread(d[\"file_name\"])\n",
    "    im = gray2rgb(im)\n",
    "    segm = imread(d['sem_seg_file_name'])\n",
    "    \n",
    "    inputs = test_mapper(d)\n",
    "    vtrue= Visualizer(inputs['image'].permute(1, 2, 0), metadata=metadata, scale=0.5, instance_mode=ColorMode.IMAGE_BW)\n",
    "    true = vtrue.draw_sem_seg(inputs['sem_seg'])\n",
    "    for keypoints in inputs['instances'].gt_keypoints.tensor:\n",
    "        true = vtrue.draw_and_connect_keypoints(keypoints)\n",
    "    \n",
    "    outputs = predictor(im)\n",
    "    mask = torch.argmax(softmax(outputs['sem_seg'], dim=0), dim=0).to(\"cpu\").numpy()\n",
    "    vpred= Visualizer(im[:, :, ::-1], metadata=metadata, scale=0.5, instance_mode=ColorMode.IMAGE_BW)\n",
    "    pred = vpred.draw_sem_seg(mask)\n",
    "    for keypoints in outputs['instances'].pred_keypoints:\n",
    "        x_data = [point[0] for point in keypoints]\n",
    "        y_data = [point[1] for point in keypoints]\n",
    "        pred = vpred.draw_line(x_data, y_data, color='red')\n",
    "    \n",
    "    \n",
    "    plt.figure(figsize=(16, 6))\n",
    "    plt.subplot(1, 3, 1, title=\"image\").imshow(im)\n",
    "    plt.subplot(1, 3, 2, title=\"groundtruth\").imshow(true.get_image()[:, :, ::-1])\n",
    "    plt.subplot(1, 3, 3, title=\"prediction\").imshow(pred.get_image()[:, :, ::-1])\n",
    "    os.makedirs(\"visualization/val\", exist_ok=True)\n",
    "    plt.savefig(os.path.join(\"visualization/val\", os.path.split(d[\"file_name\"])[-1]))\n",
    "    plt.show()"
   ]
  },

   "cell_type": "markdown",

   "source": [
    "## Convert to Python and Submit Job"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "### convert to python file"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 51,
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [
    {
     "name": "stdout",
     "output_type": "stream",
     "text": [
      "[NbConvertApp] Converting notebook ModelTraining.ipynb to python\n",
      "[NbConvertApp] Writing 22608 bytes to ModelTraining.py\n"
     ]
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "!jupyter nbconvert --to python ModelTraining.ipynb"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "### reformat the python file"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 52,
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "filename = \"ModelTraining.py\"\n",
    "with open(filename) as file:\n",
    "    data = file.read()\n",
    "data = data.split(\"# ****\")[0]\n",
    "lines = data.split(\"\\n\")\n",
    "lines = [line for line in lines if not (line.startswith(\"# In\") or line.startswith(\"get_ipython()\"))]\n",
    "data = \"\\n\".join(lines)\n",
    "data = data.replace(\"\\n\\n\\n\", \"\\n\\n\")\n",
    "data = data.replace(\"\\n\\n\\n\", \"\\n\\n\")\n",
    "with open(filename, \"w\") as file:\n",
    "    file.write(data)"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "### create bash file"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 53,
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "commands = \\\n",
    "f\"\"\"#PBS -N EC\n",
    "#PBS -l select=1:ncpus=8:mem=64GB:scratch=128GB:ngpus=1\n",
    "#PBS -l walltime=12:00:00\n",
    "#PBS -q gpuq\n",
    "\n",
    "cd $PBS_O_WORKDIR\n",
    "source activate flask\n",
    "python {filename}\n",
    "\"\"\"\n",
    "\n",
    "with open(\"script.sh\", \"w\") as file:\n",
    "    file.write(commands)"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "### submit job on Quriosity"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 54,
   "metadata": {},

  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "### generate and submit job"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 1,
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [
    {
     "data": {
      "text/plain": [
       "0"
      ]
     },
     "execution_count": 1,
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "execute_result"
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "import os, shutil\n",
    "\n",
    "root = \"../train-2022101404-semanticfpn-aug-adhension-line\"\n",
    "\n",
    "filename_notebook = \"ModelTraining.ipynb\"\n",
    "filename_python = \"ModelTraining.py\"\n",
    "\n",
    "os.makedirs(root, exist_ok=\"True\")\n",
    "\n",
    "os.system(f\"cp {filename_notebook} {root}\")\n",
    "os.system(f\"cp adhensionnet.py {root}\")\n",
    "os.system(f\"cd {root} && jupyter nbconvert --to python ModelTraining.ipynb\")\n",
    "\n",
    "filename = os.path.join(root, filename_python)\n",
    "with open(filename) as file:\n",
    "    data = file.read()\n",
    "data = data.split(\"# ****\")[0]\n",
    "lines = data.split(\"\\n\")\n",
    "lines = [line for line in lines if not (line.startswith(\"# In\") or line.startswith(\"get_ipython()\"))]\n",
    "data = \"\\n\".join(lines)\n",
    "data = data.replace(\"\\n\\n\\n\", \"\\n\\n\")\n",
    "data = data.replace(\"\\n\\n\\n\", \"\\n\\n\")\n",
    "with open(filename, \"w\") as file:\n",
    "    file.write(data)\n",
    "    \n",
    "commands = \\\n",
    "f\"\"\"#PBS -N EC\n",
    "#PBS -l select=1:ncpus=8:mem=64GB:scratch=128GB:ngpus=1\n",
    "#PBS -l walltime=12:00:00\n",
    "#PBS -q gpuq\n",
    "\n",
    "cd $PBS_O_WORKDIR\n",
    "source activate flask\n",
    "python {filename_python}\n",
    "\"\"\"\n",
    "\n",
    "with open(os.path.join(root, \"script.sh\"), \"w\") as file:\n",
    "    file.write(commands)\n",
    "    \n",
    "os.system(f\"cd {root} && qsub script.sh\")"
   ]
  },
